title: ModForLazyPeople
description: A mod that adds macros, and a few QOL features. Mainly designed for the redstone server Synergy.
body:
# ModForLazyPeople
![The main MFLP screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/037c9e5a9ce1dfedd47d78d410b31f85900d98ec.png)

MFLP lets you create command macros, and adds features like auto welcome back or auto welcome, which mainly work on the redstone server Synergy.

## Supported platforms
For now, MFLP will only be available on fabric for Minecraft 1.20.4 (and possibly newer versions if Synergy updates).

# Development
I am not a profesional developer! Keep this in mind, I have not been modding for long, and if any issues occur, please report them and i will try to fix them. To report issues go to the [Issue tracker on github](https://github.com/tolek-tpr/ModForLazyPeople/issues) or on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/z7aRsNKm9z). Feel free to give me suggestions, and if I find that they fit the mod I might add them.
